pit_policy.signal_rule: External feed observations may only join a stock signal date when available_date <= signal_date; same-day joins on raw date are forbidden.
pit_policy.final_holdout_policy: No 2026 tuning. 2026 remains final holdout until a candidate passes long-cycle and walk-forward gates.

promotion_policy.reason: Round170 only preregisters factor seeds and verifies a small processed-write smoke.

factor_seeds.hypothesis: Rapid financing-buy acceleration can mark crowded demand exhaustion; test negative forward-return relation after liquidity and size controls.
factor_seeds.expression_plan: rank(ts_delta(rzmre, 5) / ts_mean(abs(rzmre), 20)) with high-rzye crowding guard; direction preregistered as negative.

factor_seeds.hypothesis: Persistently high financing balance relative to its own trailing level can be a crowded-position reversal proxy.
Gradual northbound holding-ratio accumulation may proxy informed institutional demand, but must be tested against crowded-flow reversal.
factor_seeds.expression_plan: rank(ts_delta(hold_ratio, 20)) with missing and coverage filters; direction preregistered as positive.

factor_seeds.hypothesis: Stock-level northbound accumulation should be separated by aggregate northbound flow regime; the same stock signal may reverse during broad outflow stress.
factor_seeds.expression_plan: rank(ts_delta(hold_ratio, 20)) interacted with trailing 5d/20d north_money regime; no standalone aggregate-flow rank.

factor_seeds.hypothesis: Index valuation and turnover state may identify when reversal/carry factors are allowed or blocked; it is not a standalone stock-ranking factor.
factor_seeds.expression_plan: market-level regime features from index drawdown, turnover, PE/PB z-scores; use only as interaction/gating variable.

factor_seeds.hypothesis: SHIBOR level/slope changes can flag credit-liquidity tightening regimes where leverage/crowding signals should be stress-gated.
factor_seeds.expression_plan: market-level shibor_3m minus shibor_1m and 20d changes; no standalone stock cross-sectional rank.
factor_seeds.coverage_note: LPR columns are excluded until non-missing LPR coverage is proven.
